title: acanthyllis numidica
intro: Acanthyllis numidica, also known as the African wormwood or desert wormwood, is a plant species belonging to the family Verbenaceae. Traditionally, Acanthyllis numidica has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antifungal, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Acanthyllis numidica can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
